programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: The teams’ trust, and team work is tested as they go in blind into a face off challenge. Then who will be one step closer to victory in the all-important treasure hunt.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner offers Lisa a chance to tutor Cletus' kids; Bart tries to scare his peers out of the cafeteria by claiming it’s haunted.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny are thrown for a loop when Leonard is offered an exciting new job opportunity overseas.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond in Leonard's absence, but it's Sheldon's feelings that are crushed when Leonard returns from the North Sea.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Will Remi pick up the guitar again? Lacey overcomes her grief to support Jo. Sonny withholds his good news.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Phil dances with danger.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: In a gruelling face-off, can Kāhu take out a challenge win? Then, shocking twist no one saw coming changes the game for good.

programme.title: New Zealand Spy
programme.desc: Undercover as an athlete, coach, and chef, the spies are sent to Christchurch for the 1974 Unity Games to protect the Indian Foreign Minister from being assassinated.

programme.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Jon Richardson and Rosie Jones take on Joe Wilkinson and Phil Wang. Dr John Cooper Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. With Rachel Riley.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: During Teen Outreach Day at the DMV, Colette pushes Gregg to mentor a disengaged teen; Vic suspects one of the students may be his biological son.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: In a gruelling face-off, can Kāhu take out a challenge win? Then, shocking twist no one saw coming changes the game for good.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A legendary comic from the good old days of Las Vegas is set to reunite with his partner on stage for one night only, until one half of the famous duo is found dead.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: When an elder care facilitate shuts down, New Amsterdam is forced to intake many new patients.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: Season Premiere: The speed dates begin! Our first three farmers begin their search for a wife. They’ll choose five ladies to take home to their farms on the most romantic journey of their lives.

programme.title: TVNZ2 Returns At 5am
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Kiri is sad when Lou goes away to a private meeting of his species, the Palorchecies. She decides to follow him.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the Tākaro Tribe on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Phil dances with danger.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Will Remi pick up the guitar again? Lacey overcomes her grief to support Jo. Sonny withholds his good news.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: In a gruelling face-off, can Kāhu take out a challenge win? Then, shocking twist no one saw coming changes the game for good.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer stops paying the nursing home, Grampa moves in with Selma.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj gets consoled about his ex-girlfriend, and Howard's relationship with his mother causes an unusual threat to his masculinity.

programme.title: St. Denis Medical
programme.desc: At the annual fundraiser, Alex and her husband, Tim, try to have a wild, kid-free night; Ron and Joyce butt heads over hosting duties.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Remi seizes the day. Sonny surprises John. Mali’s moving on.

programme.title: Movie: Mean Girls
programme.desc: Cady Heron is a hit with The Plastics, the A-list girl clique at her new school, until she makes the mistake of falling for the ex-boyfriend of alpha Plastic Regina George. Stars Lindsay Lohan..

programme.title: Unbelievable Moments Caught On Camera
programme.desc: Unbelievable, shocking and uplifting viral videos filmed across the globe. Go behind the lens to hear first hand accounts from the people involved in these once in a lifetime experiences.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A mother thought to be grieving for the loss of her family three years ago becomes a suspect in a CSI investigation.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: As a monster hurricane approaches New York, Bloom and the team scramble to put preparations in place.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Mr Throwback
programme.desc: Season Finale: After a game day from hell, Danny pulls off the impossible and has everyone on his side.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: Two farmers meet their love matches before choosing five to return to their farms. All farmers each take one special lady on a 24 hour date and the fallout leads to heartbreak.

programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides Australia
programme.desc: Our Travel Guides jet off to Sri Lanka. In Nuwara Eliya they’ll travel in a tuk tuk, sample the local cuisine and head to Ramboda Falls. Will our guides love it or loath it?
